HOW YOUR SCORE IS BUILT

Three reads · one number · no model
ENERGY—
SLEEP—
SORENESS—
0
Each read maps to 25 · 50 · 75 · 100. Your score is their average — same inputs, same number, every time. It sharpens the readiness ZEAL reads from your wearables; the verdict itself always comes from the engine.

HOW ZEAL DECIDES
A formula, not an AI

Every verdict is a weighted read of five signals — no black box, no guessing. When a signal is missing, its weight is shared across the rest.

HRV

Your cycle phase, pregnancy and life stage adjust the result too — always toward your safety.

WHY THIS VERDICT
WHY THIS VERDICT.
The signals behind today's call

ALL SIGNALS
    WHAT FEEDS ZEAL.
    How your wearable sharpens the verdict

    OBEYOS reads your signals through Apple Health. Any wearable that syncs with Apple Health feeds ZEAL automatically. The richer the data, the sharper your verdict.

    Wearable HRV Sleep Rest HR Active ZEAL Quality
    Apple Watch
    ✓
    ✓
    ✓
    ✓
    Full Signal
    Oura Ring
    ✓
    ✓
    ✓
    ✓
    Full Signal
    Garmin
    ✓
    ✓
    ✓
    ✓
    Full Signal
    Polar
    ✓
    ✓
    ✓
    ✓
    Full Signal
    Whoop
    ✕
    ✓
    ✓
    ✓
    Reduced — no HRV
    Fitbit
    ✕
    ✓
    ✓
    ✓
    Reduced — no HRV
    No wearable
    ✕
    ✕
    ✕
    ✕
    Manual Only

    Whoop and Fitbit do not share HRV with Apple Health. ZEAL can still issue a verdict without HRV, but it carries less signal weight. Direct Whoop and Fitbit integrations are on the roadmap.

    ◦ ZEAL · INFORMATIONAL MATCH
    ZEAL IS A SIGNAL ENGINE — NOT A DOCTOR

    What you’re about to see is general, educational information about commonly used supplements, matched to the goals and signals you gave us. It is not medical advice, not a diagnosis, and not a treatment plan.

    • OBEYOS and ZEAL are not a medical or healthcare service and do not provide medical advice.
    • This information is educational only and is not a substitute for a doctor, pharmacist, or other qualified professional.
    • Talk to a healthcare professional before starting, stopping, or changing any supplement — especially if you are pregnant or breastfeeding, take medication, or have a health condition.
    • Supplements can interact with medications and conditions. Only you and your clinician know your full picture.
    • You are responsible for your own choices. You use this information at your own risk. To the maximum extent permitted by law, OBEYOS accepts no liability for how you act on it.

    ZEAL never prescribes and never tells you a dose — always follow the product label and your professional’s guidance.

    ◦ ZEAL · YOUR STACK
    YOUR STACK · BEFORE WE START

    OBEYOS tracks your supplements to flag redundancies and protect your investment. This is not medical advice. Always consult a healthcare professional before changing your supplement protocol.

    GLOSSARY
    Tap a card to flip
    HRV
    Tap to flip
    Heart Rate Variability — the time between heartbeats. Higher = better recovery. ZEAL reads it each morning.
    RPE
    Tap to flip
    Rate of Perceived Exertion — a 1–10 scale of how hard a set felt. 10 = absolute max effort.
    MEV
    Tap to flip
    Minimum Effective Volume — the least training that still drives progress.
    MAV
    Tap to flip
    Maximum Adaptive Volume — the sweet spot where you grow fastest. ZEAL targets this.
    MRV
    Tap to flip
    Maximum Recoverable Volume — the ceiling before training becomes junk you can't recover from.
    TSS
    Tap to flip
    Training Stress Score — one number for a session's load (intensity × duration).
    TDEE
    Tap to flip
    Total Daily Energy Expenditure — all the calories you burn in a day, rest plus activity.
    BMR
    Tap to flip
    Basal Metabolic Rate — the calories your body burns at complete rest.
    RIR
    Tap to flip
    Reps In Reserve — how many reps you had left in the tank. RIR 2 = stopped 2 short of failure.
    1RM
    Tap to flip
    One Rep Max — the most weight you can lift for a single rep. Loads are set as a % of it.
